bug_report.summary: Top-right word-count overlay shows wrong document’s count (out of sync with active editor/pane)
steps_to_reproduce: Launch the app (fresh environment is sufficient).
Open the File menu (or otherwise keep the UI in a state where the bottom-right editor pane is active).
Compare the top-right word-count overlay with the active editor’s status bar word count.
expected_behaviors: The top-right word-count overlay should match the currently focused/active editor pane/document (and match the word count shown in that pane’s status bar).
actual_behaviors: After the change, the top-right overlay shows 1,596 words while the active bottom-right editor/status bar shows 61 words (indicating the overlay is pulling the count from a different document/pane).

bug_report.summary: Selecting the newly saved file tab shows an empty document (0 words) instead of the saved Markdown content
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new Markdown file and save it via the Save dialog with non-empty content (as in the scenario).
Click the tab for the newly saved file (e.g., “standalone_consolidation_test…”).
expected_behaviors: The editor should display the saved file contents (e.g., the “# Consolidation Test” text).
Word/character counts should reflect the saved content (non-zero).
actual_behaviors: After the change, when the saved file’s tab is selected, the editor appears blank and the status indicates 0 words / 0 characters, suggesting the tab is not loading/binding to the saved content.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — predicted an non-executed action as executed

bug_report.summary: Opening a standalone file changes its label from filename to document title in the left ‘Files’ list and top tab (inconsistent naming)
steps_to_reproduce: Use File → Open file… to open `standalone_consolidation_test.md` from inside `ws-toolbar-consolidate-01`.
Observe the label used for the opened file in the left sidebar ‘Files’ section and in the editor tab title.
expected_behaviors: Standalone file roots should use a consistent naming convention across builds (preferably the filename, e.g., `standalone_consolidation_test.md`, or a clearly documented rule).
actual_behaviors: After the change, the opened file is labeled as “Consolidation Test” (document title) instead of the filename shown before, leading to inconsistent identification of standalone file roots.
